response.original_title: Princess Cruise add another room guide: How do I add another room on an Princess Cruise? Add extra cabin now at +1-866-829-1280
response.overview: To add a room to an existing Princess Cruise booking, you must call Princess support at +1-866-829-1280 (USA) or +44-[204]-586-5316 (UK), or contact your travel agent, as this usually cannot be done online.  Call Princess at +1-866-829-1280 (US) or your agent to link the two reservation numbers. Yes, you can add someone to your Princess Cruise room after booking +1-866-829-1280, provided your cabin has the capacity (e.g., a sofa bed or upper Pullman) and the ship has not reached maximum capacity +1-866-829-1280. To add a room or an extra cabin +1-866-829-1280 to an existing Princess cruise booking, you must contact Princess Cruises directly +1-866-829-1280 or use a travel agent to check availability, as this is treated as a new reservation. To add a room (additional cabin) to an existing Princess cruise booking, you must call Princess directly at +1-866-829-1280 (USA) or contact a travel agent, as this cannot be done online.
response.title: Princess Cruise add another room guide: How do I add another room on an Princess Cruise? Add extra cabin now at +1-866-829-1280
